Jessica Taylor
Senior Technical Recruiter / Talent Acquisition Partner, New York, NY
jessica.taylor@example.com | 555-201-3020 | linkedin.com/in/jessica-taylor-ta

SUMMARY
Talent acquisition partner with 7 years recruiting across technical and
go-to-market roles. Owns full-cycle recruiting, sourcing, and candidate
experience, partnering with hiring managers to build diverse teams.

EXPERIENCE
Senior Technical Recruiter — Vantage Software (2020–present)
- Own full-cycle recruiting for engineering and product roles, sourcing
  candidates, running interviews, and closing offers across 40+ hires per year.
- Partner with hiring managers on workforce planning, interview design, and
  candidate experience; drove time-to-fill down 30%.
- Lead employer-branding and diversity-sourcing initiatives and manage the ATS
  (Greenhouse) and recruiting analytics.

Recruiter / People Operations Coordinator — Brightwave (2017–2020)
- Managed sourcing, scheduling, and onboarding; supported people-operations
  programs and HR onboarding for new hires.

SKILLS
Recruiting, talent acquisition, full-cycle recruiting, sourcing, interviewing,
candidate experience, hiring, onboarding, employer branding, diversity sourcing,
people operations, HR, ATS, Greenhouse, workforce planning

EDUCATION
B.A. Human Resources Management, Penn State University, 2017
